case_number: Constitution Petition on the ground that FIR No.91/2019

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1304 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 26.02.2020 Ms. Rukhsana Mehnaz, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Ms. Rukhsana Mehnaz, counsel for the petitioner, under the instructions, does not press this Constitution Petition on the ground that FIR No.91/2019 registered at P.S Abad, Sukkur has been disposed of under “C” class. In the view of above, the petition is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
